title: More Wires
description: Adds more colors of redstone, and adds Infiniwire - redstone where signal strength doesn't deplete!
body: This mods adds 5 new colors of redstone wire, and 6 colors of infiniwire - redstone wire that doesn't lose signal strength with each block. The colors added are blue, green, orange, pink, and yellow. The colors are crafted by combining 8 wire with a dye. Infiniwire can be crafted using 8 wires of the same color and an iron ingot, and can also by dyed. Adjacent wires that are different colors or are not the same type of wire will not connect.
